consoleWarning:
WARNING!
Using this console, attackers can impersonate you and steal your credentials using a method called Self-XSS. Avoid entering or pasting code you do not understand.

AUTH_ERRORS.EMAIL_EXISTS: Email address is already in use.
AUTH_ERRORS.EXPIRED_POPUP_REQUEST: Popup request was cancelled. Please try again.
AUTH_ERRORS.POPUP_CLOSED_BY_USER: Popup was closed by the user. Please try again.
AUTH_ERRORS.POPUP_BLOCKED: Popup was blocked by the browser. Please allow popups for this site.
AUTH_ERRORS.TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS_TRY_LATER: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
AUTH_ERRORS.USER_DELETED: User not found with the provided credentials.
AUTH_ERRORS.NEED_CONFIRMATION: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in with your existing account to link it.
AUTH_ERRORS.NETWORK_REQUEST_FAILED: Network error. Please check your internet connection.
AUTH_ERRORS.OPERATION_NOT_SUPPORTED: This operation is not supported in the current environment.
AUTH_ERRORS.PROVIDER_ALREADY_LINKED: This provider is already linked to the user.
AUTH_ERRORS.INVALID_ORIGIN: This domain is not authorized for OAuth operations.
AUTH_ERRORS.NO_SUCH_PROVIDER: No such provider is linked to the user.
AUTH_ERRORS.ADMIN_ONLY_OPERATION: This operation is restricted to administrators.
AUTH_ERRORS.APP_NOT_AUTHORIZED: This app is not authorized for authentication.
AUTH_ERRORS.CORS_UNSUPPORTED: CORS is not supported by the browser.
AUTH_ERRORS.CREDENTIAL_ALREADY_IN_USE: This credential is already associated with a different user account.
AUTH_ERRORS.CREDENTIAL_TOO_OLD_LOGIN_AGAIN: Please log in again to perform this operation.
AUTH_ERRORS.DEPENDENT_SDK_INIT_BEFORE_AUTH: A dependent SDK was initialized before Auth.
AUTH_ERRORS.QUOTA_EXCEEDED: Quota exceeded. Please try again later.
AUTH_ERRORS.REDIRECT_OPERATION_PENDING: A redirect operation is already pending.
AUTH_ERRORS.SECOND_FACTOR_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Maximum number of second factors exceeded.
AUTH_ERRORS.USER_NULL_AFTER_SIGNIN: User object is null after sign-in.
AUTH_ERRORS.PHONE_VERIFICATION_SENT: Verification code sent to your phone.
AUTH_ERRORS.PHONE_NUMBER_NOT_FOUND: Phone number not found on user object after verification.
AUTH_ERRORS.PHONE_VERIFIED_SUCCESS: Phone number verified and signed in successfully!
AUTH_ERRORS.SIGN_IN_FAILED_USER_DATA_NOT_FOUND: Sign-in failed: User data not found after phone verification.
AUTH_ERRORS.USER_NULL_AFTER_PHONE_VERIFICATION: User object is null after phone verification.
AUTH_ERRORS.EMAIL_OR_PHONE_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email or phone number is not verified. Please verify to proceed.
AUTH_ERRORS.UNKNOWN_ERROR: An unknown error occurred during authentication.

LOGIN.WELCOME_MESSAGE: Welcome back! Please enter your credentials.
LOGIN.IDENTIFIER_PLACEHOLDER: Enter your Email or Phone Number
LOGIN.IDENTIFIER_REQUIRED: Email or Phone Number is required

SIGNUP.JOIN_MESSAGE: Join us in just a few steps. It only takes a moment.
SIGNUP.FULL_NAME_MINLENGTH: Name must be at least 2 characters
SIGNUP.SIGNUP_SUCCESS: Account created successfully! Please verify your email.
SIGNUP.WEAK_PASSWORD: Password is too weak. Must contain uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
SIGNUP.WEAK_PASSWORD_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
SIGNUP.WEAK_PASSWORD_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
SIGNUP.WEAK_PASSWORD_NUMBER: Password must contain at least one number.
SIGNUP.WEAK_PASSWORD_SPECIAL: Password must contain at least one special character.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET_PASSWORD.INSTRUCTION: Enter your email to reset your password.
RESET_PASSWORD.RESET_EMAIL_SENT: Password reset email has been sent. Check your inbox.

VERIFICATION.INSTRUCTION: Please verify your account to access the dashboard.
VERIFICATION.EMAIL_SENT: A verification email has been sent to your inbox.
VERIFICATION.PHONE_INSTRUCTION: Please verify your phone number to access the dashboard.
